text:
Researchers announced a breakthrough in error correction for superconducting qubits achieving high fidelity across many operations.
The team published detailed methodology demonstrating scalability for fault tolerant quantum systems.

Researchers announced a breakthrough in error correction for superconducting qubits achieving high fidelity across many operations.
The team published detailed methodology demonstrating scalability for fault tolerant quantum systems.
